title: Delireum
description: A modpack made to make "scary" mods actually scary hope you scream while playing this <3
body:
Deliruem is a horror-themed Minecraft modpack that adds a variety of terrifying elements to the game. The modpack includes new mobs, items, and blocks that will challenge even the most experienced players.
Deliruem also includes a variety of gameplay changes that will make the game even more challenging.
